estimatedRevenue.summary: Celebration funded by sponsors · toy gifts collected separately

gifts.name: Safe Celebration
gifts.tagline: 1 slot · private security for a packed District 56 evening.
gifts.description: The only cash core underwrite for the celebration — day-of private security so families can attend safely (entry points, crowd flow, hall presence). Past seasons ran about $500–$750. Dinner, Santa, crafts, and the rest of the evening are gift-registry stories, not core ops.

gifts.name: Spread the Word
gifts.tagline: 2 slots · flyers, banners, and print that fill the room and the town.
gifts.description: Underwrite printing — celebration flyers, banners, and Champion-style print jobs that invite families and thank sponsors. Recent seasons spent about $150–$280 on print.

gifts.name: Raffle Items
gifts.description: Stock the raffle with gift items families want to win. Cash underwrites purchase; in-kind donations of new items are welcome (email contact@elkgrovetoydrive.com).
benefits: Raffle sponsor recognition on site signage

gifts.name: Kids Game
gifts.tagline: 5 slots · game stations with prizes for kids.
gifts.description: Fund a kids game station — prizes, staffing support, and materials so every child can play and win something during the celebration.

gifts.name: Inflatable Carnival Games
gifts.tagline: 3 slots · our owned 8-station carnival games — deploy labor, not a bounce-house rental.
gifts.description: cPALSs + VACOS already own the Magic Jump–class 8-station inflatable carnival games bundle ([product reference](https://www.magicjump.com/blog/inflatable-carnival-games/)). This gift funds deploy cost only — trailer, setup/teardown crew, cleaning, and storage amortization — so kids get a big-energy carnival zone at the celebration. Complements Kids Game stations. Not bounce houses (vendor rental is a separate product if ever funded).

lineItems.label: Deploy cost share — trailer, crew, cleaning, storage amortization (per slot)

gifts.name: Performance
gifts.tagline: 6 slots · live entertainment for the evening.
gifts.description: Underwrite live performances and stage programming — magic, dance, music, and other family entertainment that fills the District 56 celebration.

gifts.name: Chocolate Bar
gifts.description: Fund the chocolate / sweet bar hospitality station for families throughout the celebration.

gifts.name: Crafts Table
gifts.description: Supply arts-and-crafts tables — materials, volunteers support, and take-home activities kids create during the fete.

gifts.name: Dinner
gifts.tagline: 10 slots · free community dinner for guests.
gifts.description: Help serve a free dinner for families at the celebration — cash underwrites catering and service supplies; in-kind food donations (trays from restaurants and community partners) count toward the same Dinner story. Dinner is a signature moment of hospitality for the Elk Grove community.
benefits: Dinner sponsor recognition on menu signage

gifts.name: Video & Photographer
gifts.tagline: 2 slots · capture the evening for families and partners.
gifts.description: Fund professional video and photography so families, sponsors, and charities have lasting images from the celebration.
benefits: Media sponsor recognition in highlight reel credits
Logo option on select photo backdrops

gifts.name: Volunteers
gifts.tagline: 2 slots · hospitality for the volunteer corps.
gifts.description: Support the volunteer team — meals, shirts, hydration, and appreciation so 50–60 day-of volunteers can serve guests and charities well.

gifts.name: Santa Photo
gifts.tagline: 1 slot · free professional photos with Santa.
gifts.description: Underwrite free professional photography with Santa — a highlight for Christmas cards and family keepsakes. Includes photographer, staging, and Santa hospitality.
benefits: Featured logo on photo backdrop (when available)

gifts.name: Christmas Decorations
gifts.tagline: 2 slots · turn District 56 into a winter wonderland.
gifts.description: Fund immersive Christmas décor — trees, lighting, themed zones — so guests feel the holiday spirit the moment they walk in.
benefits: Decor naming credit on entrance / main hall

sponsorTiers.label: Friend
sponsorTiers.tagline: 10 slots · name on the celebration website
sponsorTiers.description: Entry recognition tier. Claim slots at this level, or reach it through Fund the Fete gifts. Tier benefits stack with naming credit on any gifts you fund.

sponsorTiers.label: Community
sponsorTiers.description: Recognition tier for Community-level partners. Claim slots at this level, or reach it through gifts. Tier benefits stack with naming credit on any gifts you fund.

sponsorTiers.label: Celebration
sponsorTiers.description: Recognition tier for Celebration-level partners. Claim slots at this level, or reach it through gifts. Tier benefits stack with naming credit on any gifts you fund.
benefits: Mention in email to mailing list

sponsorTiers.label: Presenting
sponsorTiers.description: Co-presenting partner recognition. Claim up to 2 Presenting slots. Tier benefits stack with naming credit on any Fund the Fete gifts you fund.
benefits: Mention in email to mailing list

sponsorTiers.label: Title
sponsorTiers.description: Title-level partner recognition for the celebration. Claim up to 2 Title slots. Tier benefits stack with naming credit on any Fund the Fete gifts you fund.

globalPerks.label: Stage recognition
globalPerks.description: MC thank-yous for sponsors during the celebration.

globalPerks.label: Website logo roll
globalPerks.description: Sponsor logos and names on elkgrovetoydrive.com.
